Patient complains of inguinal swelling Take history and examine for genital ulcers,rule out infection of thefoot,leg or buttock and exclude inguinal hernia If genital ulcer is present Inguinal/femoral buboes present and no ulcer Treat as genital ulcer Give Doxycycline 100 mg 12 hourly for 14 days. Treat partner.If partner pregnant,instead of Dox- ycycline give Erythromycin 500mg every 6 hours for 14 days. Do not incise bubo. Aspirate through normal skin with a large bore needle gauge<20 every 2 days until resolution. If buboes persist, check to see if partner was treated.If partner not treated ← Continue withDoxycycline100 mg12 hourly for 14 days or Erythromycin 500 mg every 6 hours for 14 days. If no improvement Refer for specialist's management
